insight.headline: Merchant-owned delivery
insight.what_changed: Merchant-owned delivery profile APIs are deprecated for market-driven shipping. Shipping configuration is moving from legacy delivery profiles to Markets. The GraphQL Admin API supports market-driven shipping configuration starting in API version 2026-07.
insight.developer_impact: Developers need to update their integrations to use the new market-driven shipping APIs. They should review their code and replace any usage of the deprecated delivery profile APIs with the new market-driven shipping APIs. This change affects how shipping is configured and may require updates to existing workflows.
insight.merchant_impact: Merchants will need to configure shipping directly on a market, which helps apps support different shipping scenarios.
insight.why_it_matters: This change is important because it allows for more flexible and scalable shipping configurations, and it's a required update to ensure compatibility with future API versions.

also_worth_knowing.text: OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus now returns FULFILLMENT_NOT_REQUIRED for orders with no items to fulfill
Market-driven shipping now available in feature preview

updates.title: OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus now returns FULFILLMENT_NOT_REQUIRED for orders with no items to fulfill
updates.summary: The OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus enum now returns FULFILLMENT_NOT_REQUIRED for orders with no items to fulfill. This change is available as of API version 2026-10.

updates.title: Shop Minis May June 2026 update
updates.summary: The React SDK has added typed product variant intent hooks for selecting variants, adding variants to cart, and sending buyers to express checkout. This update is part of the Shop Minis May June 2026 update.

updates.title: Market-driven shipping now available in feature preview
updates.summary: Market-driven shipping is now available in feature preview, allowing merchants to configure shipping options directly to each market and vary rates by profile.

updates.title: @shopify/mini-oxygen@4.2.0
updates.summary: The @shopify/mini-oxygen package has been updated to version 4.2.0, making the Oxygen Vite plugin self-sufficient by inferring a compatibility date from the resolved Hydrogen package.

updates.title: @shopify/cli-hydrogen@13.0.0
updates.summary: The @shopify/cli-hydrogen package has been updated to version 13.0.0, adding deploy flags and environment variables for configuring Oxygen's client assets directory and worker directory.

updates.title: Draft order deposit fields are now available in the GraphQL Admin API and Customer Account API
updates.summary: Draft order deposit fields are now available in the GraphQL Admin API and Customer Account API, allowing apps to set a deposit when creating or updating a draft order.

updates.title: Deprecation of cumulative marketing engagements
updates.summary: The isCumulative argument to the marketingEngagementCreate mutation is being deprecated, defaulting to false, and integrations should be updated to send non-cumulative engagements.

updates.title: New `lineItem` field on the `GiftCard` object
updates.summary: The GiftCard object in the GraphQL Admin API now includes a lineItem field, representing the LineItem from the order that initiated the gift card's creation.

updates.title: Discount application information now available for draft orders on the Customer Account API
updates.summary: Discount application information is now available for draft orders on the Customer Account API, allowing developers to query discounts applied to a draft order.

updates.title: `discountedUnitPrice` on `DraftOrderLineItem` Customer Account API deprecation
updates.summary: The discountedUnitPrice field on the DraftOrderLineItem object in the Customer Account API is deprecated, and developers should use approximateDiscountedUnitPrice instead.

updates.title: `BusinessEntity` now exposes `legalEntityId` in the GraphQL Admin API
updates.summary: The BusinessEntity type in the GraphQL Admin API now includes a new legalEntityId field, which returns the stable Central Legal Entity ID from Shopify's Organizations Platform.

updates.title: Merchant-owned delivery profile APIs are deprecated for market-driven shipping
updates.summary: Merchant-owned delivery profile APIs are deprecated in favor of market-driven shipping, which configures shipping per market.

recap.headline: Shopify updates GraphQL Admin API, Hydrogen, and more

themes.title: GraphQL Admin API updates
themes.detail: The GraphQL Admin API has been updated with new features, including the OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus enum, draft order deposit fields, and the lineItem field on the GiftCard object. Additionally, the BusinessEntity type now includes a legalEntityId field, and the discountedUnitPrice field on the DraftOrderLineItem object has been deprecated in favor of approximateDiscountedUnitPrice.

themes.title: Hydrogen updates and deployments
themes.detail: Hydrogen has been updated with new versions of @shopify/mini-oxygen and @shopify/cli-hydrogen, which include changes to the Oxygen Vite plugin and deploy flags for configuring Oxygen's client assets directory and worker directory. Hydrogen can now also be deployed to Vercel in a few clicks.

themes.title: Market-driven shipping and deprecations
themes.detail: Market-driven shipping is now available in feature preview, and merchant-owned delivery profile APIs are deprecated in favor of market-driven shipping configuration. The GraphQL Admin API supports market-driven shipping configuration starting in API version 2026-07.

actions.text: Update integrations to use non-cumulative marketing engagements
Replace deprecated discountedUnitPrice field with approximateDiscountedUnitPrice
